subject: Re:
body: I hope so. He's an Israeli person. Speaks Hebrew. I had to force Boogie Man metaphor upon him. And god knows how he'll put Security into English.
body_html: <html><head><meta http-equiv="content-type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8"></head><body dir="auto"><div>I hope so. He's an Israeli person. Speaks Hebrew. I had to force Boogie Man metaphor upon him. And god knows how he'll put Security into English.
